standardized_from: AP CER LSP methodology and engineer SOTA feedback
research_question_formulation: IFU claim -> clinical uncertainty -> SOTA/DuE PICO -> searchable concepts -> database query -> appraisal -> benchmark/claim conclusion.
sota_purpose: Define current knowledge, clinical pathway, alternatives, hazards, endpoints and acceptance criteria.
due_purpose: Identify subject/equivalent/similar device clinical data using trade names, manufacturer names and model identifiers.
database_selection: PubMed, Europe PMC, ClinicalTrials.gov, Embase and Cochrane are attempted or limitation-recorded; internet/regulatory/vigilance sources are handled in their dedicated steps.
duplicate_handling: Duplicate records are screened by article/source identifiers and title; duplicates are not counted as independent clinical evidence.
full_text_rule: No article may be pivotal unless PMID/DOI/citation is verified and full text or source-document data are available for endpoint extraction.
appraisal_method: SOTA evidence uses CK1-CK6; device evidence uses IMDRF suitability/contribution plus Oxford/CEBM-style evidence level.
deviation_rule: Unavailable subscription databases, language/date restrictions and missing full texts are recorded in protocol_deviation_log and cannot be interpreted as no evidence.
